Date: # Secret Guest Audit log — we message the operator AS A GUEST and measure THEIR response.
# KEY DISTINCTION: an auto-responder answering in seconds is NOT good service. What matters is the HUMAN response time (column K) and quality. Log both.
# Human replied? = Yes / No reply (leave blank until decided). Human response time (h): =IF(AND(E2<>"",J2<>""),(J2-E2)*24,"")

# Required wording when reporting a result: "In one test on {date}, the (human) response took {X}. This does not establish normal performance, but it identified a scenario worth reviewing." One test = a signal, not proof.
